projectDescription: A next generation astronomical alert broker written in Rust for processing and filtering real-time survey alerts at scale.
keyFeatures: Multi-stage alert processing pipeline with Kafka consumers, alert ingestion workers, enrichment workers, and filter workers
Real-time astronomical alert brokering from multiple surveys (ZTF, LSST, DECam)
Crossmatching with archival catalogs (PS1, Gaia, NED, MilliQuas)
User-defined filters with MongoDB aggregation pipelines
RESTful API for alert queries and filter management
Scalable worker architecture with Redis/Valkey task queues
publicApiSurface: kafka_consumer - Read alerts from Kafka topics and queue for processing
kafka_producer - Produce test alerts from archived data
scheduler - Manage alert, enrichment, and filter workers
add_filter - CLI tool to add filters to the system
API: POST /api/v1/auth/login - Authenticate and get JWT token
API: POST /api/v1/filters/{id}/versions - Create new filter version
API: GET /api/v1/queries/alerts - Query alerts with filters
